privileged_info_summary: The task is configured with synthetic test data for a product called Precision Ball Bearing - 6205-2RS. Two vendors are configured: Allied Industrial Supply Co. with a unit price of $12.50, minimum order quantity of 100 units, and 14-day delivery; and Pacific Bearing Solutions with a unit price of $11.80, minimum order quantity of 250 units, and 21-day delivery. The task requires ordering 500 units from the most cost-effective supplier, which is Pacific Bearing Solutions at $11.80 per unit. All vendor details, product name, quantities, prices, and delivery terms are hardcoded into the task setup scripts and requirements file.
